历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 7473 → 8735 → 9395 → 10387 → 11203, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3730 positions over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 11203, with an annual backward shift of about 800–900 positions in the last 2 years; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 16 in 2021, 60 in 2022, 58 in 2023, 60 in 2024, and 61 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 60, a slight reduction of 1 (-1.6%) compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, with a steady improvement in recent years, enhancing its appeal to candidates; the school's reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 80th (average), short video exposure is at a medium level, with no explosive communication signals; no record of enrollment gaps; Ethnology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, with outstanding advantages in liberal arts disciplines, while Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly Computer Science, Electronic Information, Statistics, etc., with average relevance to the school's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly popular and recommended, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is about 474,900, a slight increase from 472,480 in 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 267,800 based on the recent proportion of about 56%, leading to slightly intensified competition; the school is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal to Jiangxi candidates; the school's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi is relatively small, and cross-provincial application enthusiasm is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan, the slight increase in provincial candidates, and the increased attention due to the rise in Soft Science ranking, competition is expected to intensify further based on the 2025 baseline of 11203; the predicted lowest ranking is about 11123, with a range of 10623–11623.
